template.name: Hades L5 Complete（哈迪斯·完整版）
template.qualityNote: ADR 0009 M13 complete sample: all concrete nodes carry schema-valid L5 entities and cross-layer CRITICAL is zero.
template.summary: 2D动作Roguelike，快节奏战斗，Boon协同机制，叙事与玩法深度融合的独立标杆。
analysis: Extends the Hades L5_partial sample to every concrete gameplay, content, UX, presentation, balance, and liveops node.
Keeps the corrected target-player profile and L4 selections from the partial sample so cross-layer CRITICAL remains zero.
All 39 system_concrete/content_concrete nodes carry at least one schema-valid design entity.
Based on public design analysis and genre-structure inference; this is not official game configuration data.

verification.policy: 运行时不联网；内置范本固定使用本次一次性核验后的本地数据。
sources: 一次性核验参考：公开奖项、媒体/玩家口碑和平台评价。

designEntities.label: Bone Hydra boss encounter

phases.objective: damage the Hydra head while avoiding slam zones
clear summoned heads to reopen the main target

designEntities.winCondition: main Hydra head is defeated after side-head waves

phases.objective: separate bull charge and spear throw threats

designEntities.label: Hades final encounter

phases.objective: manage spear combos, casts, and skull traps
avoid laser beams and invisibility pressure

designEntities.winCondition: Hades second health bar reaches zero

coreLoops.input_control: Hades: 玩家通过高速战斗、Boon 协同和逃脱路线选择的移动、瞄准或闪避形成手感门槛。
coreLoops.action_rule: Hades: 战斗规则把敌人模式、风险和收益压缩到连续决策。
coreLoops.objective: Hades: 房间、路线和首领目标推动每轮 run 前进。
coreLoops.settlement: Hades: 战斗和 run 结算把失败、奖励和下一次尝试闭合。
coreLoops.progression: Hades: 永久解锁或能力成长承接反复挑战。
coreLoops.buildcraft: Hades: 武器、技能或增益组合形成每局差异化构筑。
coreLoops.randomness: Hades: 随机房间、掉落和奖励选择制造重玩性。
coreLoops.meta_structure: Hades: 局内 run 与局外准备共同组织长期循环。

questions: 除了上方已选系统，你的玩法是否还有玩家会反复接触的独立规则模块？
这些补充系统主要解决什么体验、目标、约束或商业需求？
补充系统是否需要独立占比，还是应并入某个已选系统？
